import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, LabelEncoder

Tecno = data['Tecno'].unique()
Foramen = data['Foramen_Mágnum_Position'].unique()
Habitat = data['Habitat'].unique()

print("Unique Diet:", Diet)
print("Unique Tecnos:", Tecno)
print("Unique Foramen:", Foramen)
print("Unique Habitat:", Habitat)

In [11]:
plt.figure(figsize=(15, 5))
plt.subplot(1, 3, 1)
sns.histplot(data['Height'], bins=20, kde=True)
plt.title('Height Distribution')

plt.subplot(1, 3, 2)
sns.histplot(data['Time'], bins=20, kde=True)
plt.title('Time Distribution')

plt.subplot(1, 3, 3)
sns.histplot(data['Cranial_Capacity'], bins=20, kde=True)
plt.title('Cranial Capacity Distribution')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [12]:
plt.figure(figsize=(15, 5))
plt.subplot(1, 3, 1)
sns.regplot(x='Height', y='Cranial_Capacity', data=data, scatter_kws={'s':10}, line_kws={'color':'red'})
plt.title('Cranial Capacity vs Height')

 #Scatter plot for Cranial Capacity vs. Time with trend line
plt.figure(figsize=(15, 5))
plt.subplot(1, 3, 1)
sns.regplot(x='Time', y='Cranial_Capacity', data=data, scatter_kws={'s':10}, line_kws={'color':'red'})
plt.title('Cranial Capacity vs. Time')
plt.show()

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

In [13]:
species_column = data.columns[0]  # Assuming the first column represents the species or genera
unique_species = data[species_column].unique()

# Plot Cranial Capacity trends by species (or genera)
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 8))

for species in unique_species:
    species_data = data[data[species_column] == species]
    plt.scatter(species_data['Time'], species_data['Cranial_Capacity'], label=species, alpha=0.6)

plt.title('Cranial Capacity Trends by Species')
plt.xlabel('Time (in millions of years)')
plt.ylabel('Cranial Capacity (in cubic centimeters)') 
plt.legend(title='Species', bbox_to_anchor=(1.05, 1), loc='upper left')  # Place the legend outside the plot
plt.grid(True)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

plt.title('Cranial Capacity by Tecno Type')

plt.subplot(1, 3, 3)
sns.boxplot(x='Foramen_Mágnum_Position', y='Cranial_Capacity', data=data)
plt.title('Cranial Capacity by Foramen Position')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

plt.show()

In [32]:
# Calculate the mean, maximum, and minimum of Cranial_Capacity
mean_cranial_capacity = data['Cranial_Capacity'].mean()
max_cranial_capacity = data['Cranial_Capacity'].max()
min_cranial_capacity = data['Cranial_Capacity'].min()


max_time = data['Time'].max()
min_time = data['Time'].min()
# Find the rows corresponding to the mean, max, and min Cranial Capacity
# For mean, we find the closest value since the exact mean may not exist in the dataset

# Find the row closest to the mean cranial capacity
mean_row = data.iloc[(data['Cranial_Capacity'] - mean_cranial_capacity).abs().argsort()[:1]]

# Find the rows corresponding to the max and min cranial capacity
max_row = data[data['Cranial_Capacity'] == max_cranial_capacity]
min_row = data[data['Cranial_Capacity'] == min_cranial_capacity]


max_row_time = data[data['Time'] == max_time]
min_row_time = data[data['Time'] == min_time]



# Combine all rows into a single DataFrame for display
summary_data = pd.concat([min_row, mean_row, max_row])

print("Summary Data for Cranial Capacity (Min, Mean, Max):")
print(summary_data)

print(max_row_time)
print(min_row_time)

In [16]:
from scipy.stats import chi2_contingency

# Contingency table for Tecno and Diet
contingency_table = pd.crosstab(data['Tecno'], data['Diet'])

# Perform Chi-Square test
chi2, p, dof, expected = chi2_contingency(contingency_table)

print(f"Chi-square test statistic: {chi2}")
print(f"P-value: {p}")

Chi-square test statistic: 10646.153846153846
P-value: 0.0
In [21]:
from statsmodels.stats.outliers_influence import variance_inflation_factor
import statsmodels.api as sm
# Define the predictors
X = data[['Time', 'Height']]

# Add a constant for the intercept term
X = sm.add_constant(X)

# Calculate VIF for each predictor
vif_data = pd.DataFrame()
vif_data['Feature'] = X.columns
vif_data['VIF'] = [variance_inflation_factor(X.values, i) for i in range(X.shape[1])]

print(vif_data)

  Feature       VIF
0   const  1.000000
1    Time  1.547339
2  Height  1.547339
